news.title: From Macron to Modi, governments are rolling out the red carpet for AI giants
news.summary: France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure. Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India want to invest in AI.

news.title: Cargo vessel in Red Sea reports coming under attack, UK maritime body says
news.summary: The incident was reported in one of the world's most crucial trade transit routes. It comes amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the U.S.

news.title: Trump Accounts for kids launched July 4: What parents need to know
news.summary: Trump accounts are free, but there are restrictions on how and when they can be withdrawn. Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies and when.

news.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
news.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.

news.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for boosting portfolio returns
news.summary: Identifying the right stocks can be challenging. With thousands of dividend-paying companies to choose from, it can be hard to find the right one.

news.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
news.summary: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference,” he says.

news.title: Hybrids are the breakout star of the U.S. car market as EV demand fades
news.summary: Hybrid cars are winning on function and price. Hybrids aren’t a bridge to EVs anymore — instead, they’re winning on Function and Price.

news.title: Why the stock market’s red-hot momentum trade might be headed for a violent unwind this month
news.summary: The rumblings have already started. Momentum trades tend to struggle in July. This year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist.

news.title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Should I confront her?
news.summary: She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400. “She said, ‘I’m so glad you sent me that,’” she said.

news.title: Gamer trades in $1,000 of physical discs at GameStop, days after Sony announces end of disc era
news.summary: A Columbus gamer decided to liquidate his collection of video games. He decided to sell off his entire collection of gaming media. The collection was worth more than $100,000.
